title: Gilmore Book Website
description: Built the back end for a book rating platform where the main challenge was supporting secure user actions, image uploads, ratings, and reliable book data without letting the API become difficult to maintain. I solved this by designing a RESTful Node.js and Express API with MongoDB and Mongoose models, organizing the code with MVC architecture, and implementing authentication, CRUD operations, image optimization, and average rating calculations. The result was a structured backend that balanced data security, maintainability, efficient database usage, and Green Code practices.

title: Booki Website
description: Created a responsive travel agency homepage from Figma mockups where the key challenge was preserving the intended design across mobile, tablet, and desktop without duplicating layouts. I overcame this by using semantic HTML, flexible CSS layouts, careful spacing, and responsive breakpoints to adapt the same structure across screen sizes. The finished page delivered a consistent user experience while strengthening my ability to translate design requirements into clean, maintainable front-end code.

title: Kasa Rental Website
description: Developed a responsive React rental application where the challenge was turning static mockups and local JSON data into a smooth multi-page experience. I addressed this by breaking the interface into reusable components, using React Router for client-side navigation, rendering property data dynamically, and organizing Sass styles for consistency across views. This approach produced a polished single-page application while demonstrating problem solving in component architecture, routing, responsive UI design, and data-driven rendering.

title: Website Optimization
description: Improved an existing website where the challenge was diagnosing why its SEO, performance, and accessibility scores were underperforming. I used Lighthouse and WAVE audits to identify specific technical issues, then applied targeted code and content improvements to address loading speed, accessibility barriers, and search visibility. I documented the process with before-and-after audit results, showing how each fix improved the site's quality, usability, and discoverability.

title: Interior Design Website
description: Built a dynamic interior designer portfolio where the challenge was adding real interactivity to a static front end while connecting it to backend API features. I solved this by using JavaScript for DOM manipulation, event handling, API communication, an administrator login flow, and a modal interface for uploading new media. The project strengthened my ability to turn design mockups into interactive user flows while managing authentication, asynchronous data, and front-end state changes.
